opinion.h: HELM ET AL. v. ARIZONA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ARIZONA. No. 768. Decided May 16, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Wade Church, Attorney General of Arizona, Leslie C. Hardy, Chief Assistant Attorney General, and Jay Dushoff, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
